long_description:
The cluster health dashboard is showing mzonep64 as drift mzone with 2 nodes (s04 and s32) missing in osprey. Incident to investigate it .
Runbook : https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/fdeca2937cfd3266a927c4909fa9e62ec104e77d/platform/alerts/troubleshooting_sysdig_logdna.md
short_description: [manual] Manual incident to investigate drift mzone mzonep64 in wdc
close_notes: The monitoring services are now up and running
